description: Codex config has APD MCP transport but no per-tool approval blocks
query: Audit APD setup; Codex keeps asking me to approve APD tools.

files.AGENTS.md:
# App

## Stack
| Layer | Tech |
|---|---|
| API | Go |

## APD

### Pipeline
Use apd:apd_advance_pipeline for APD phase transitions.

### Guardrails
Use apd:apd_guard_write before file writes.

### Mandatory skills
- apd-brainstorm
- apd-tdd
- apd-debug
- apd-finish

### Human gate
Ask before push, PR, or discard.

# code-reviewer

FORBIDDEN: do not edit files.

expected_behavior: detects that .codex/config.toml has the parent [mcp_servers.apd] transport block
detects that the eight [mcp_servers.apd.tools.<name>] approval blocks are missing
categorizes the finding as IMPORTANT because Codex will keep prompting for APD MCP tool approval
recommends rerunning apd cdx init or install-codex-config to rewrite the per-tool approval blocks
